description: This file contains Bootstrap utility functions, mixins, and functions primarily used for evaluating source code aspects such as maps, colors, and other style-related computations. It includes functions for color manipulation, map operations, contrast calculations, and Sass-specific utilities.

methods.name: _assert-ascending
methods.description: Mixin to check if a Sass map is in ascending order, warns if not.

methods.name: _assert-starts-at-zero
methods.description: Mixin to ensure the first breakpoint starts at 0, warns if not.

methods.name: to-rgb
methods.description: Converts a color value to its RGB components.

methods.name: rgba-css-var
methods.description: Generates an rgba CSS variable string based on given identifiers.

methods.name: map-loop
methods.description: Iterates over a Sass map, applying a function to each key-value pair.

methods.name: varify
methods.description: Generates CSS variable references for a list of entries.

methods.name: negativify-map
methods.description: Creates a negative variant of a map by prefixing keys with 'n' and negating values.

methods.name: map-get-multiple
methods.description: Extracts multiple keys from a Sass map based on a list of keys.

methods.name: map-merge-multiple
methods.description: Merges multiple Sass maps into one.

methods.name: str-replace
methods.description: Recursively replaces occurrences of a substring within a string.

methods.name: escape-svg
methods.description: Escapes special characters in an SVG string for embedding.

methods.name: color-contrast
methods.description: Chooses a contrasting color based on background luminance and contrast ratio.

methods.name: contrast-ratio
methods.description: Calculates the contrast ratio between two colors.

methods.name: luminance
methods.description: Calculates the relative luminance of a color for WCAG contrast.

methods.name: opaque
methods.description: Returns a fully opaque color mixed with a background.

methods.name: tint-color
methods.description: Tints a color by mixing it with white.

methods.name: shade-color
methods.description: Shades a color by mixing it with black.

methods.name: shift-color
methods.description: Shades or tints a color based on the weight.

methods.name: add
methods.description: Adds two values, with optional calc string formatting.

methods.name: subtract
methods.description: Subtracts two values, with optional calc string formatting.

methods.name: divide
methods.description: Divides two numbers with specified precision, handling units.
